summary.sosovalue: Community sentiment around SoSoValue is largely positive with excitement building around upcoming airdrops and points campaigns, though some frustration exists from users who feel their testnet participation wasn't adequately rewarded initially. Key discussions revolve around the SoDEX testnet patch airdrop list release, loyalty rewards with extra $SOSO for early builders, tiered SoPoints system (Silver, Gold, Diamond), and clarifications that this is not Season 2 but a cleanup for testnet rewards with mainnet activities offering 150M $SOSO for traders. Metrics show high engagement on related posts, such as 638 likes and 125 reposts on the official testnet announcement, 331 likes on airdrop claim guides, and ongoing appeals process highlighting real user contributions over bots. Users are grinding mainnet points via trading, swaps, and holding SSI tokens, with weekly distributions fostering consistent participation.
summary.sodex: Sentiment for Sodex is mixed-positive, with strong hype for the testnet patch airdrop (claim opens May 8) and mainnet trading rewards, but pockets of disappointment from excluded users questioning fairness and bot detection. Discussions focus on checking eligibility at testnet.sodex.com/points, appeal processes, SoPoints Week 12 distribution, tier progression, and strategies for mainnet volume farming with 150M $SOSO pool. High-engagement posts include the official announcement (638 likes, 49k views), points distribution update (294 likes), and user guides (331 likes), indicating robust community activity despite some appeals and tech support queries like trading enablement issues.
summary.ssi: No significant mentions found for SSI or SSI Index independent of SoDEX contexts; discussions tie it to holding SSI tokens for mainnet points in Sodex ecosystem, with neutral-to-positive sentiment as part of broader $SOSO farming strategies. Limited standalone metrics or debates observed in the queried period.
